description: Worktree DX automation: setup on enter, self-improvement on exit, stale detection on start

hooks.command: if [ -f scripts/setup-worktree.sh ]; then bash scripts/setup-worktree.sh; else bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/setup-worktree.sh"; fi

echo 'Before exiting: if you encountered ANY worktree friction this session (missing deps, env errors, build failures, manual steps), you MUST update the project setup-worktree.sh (or create one) to handle it automatically. Save a memory note about the fix. Check .claude/worktree-setup.log for timing data.'

STALE=$(git worktree list --porcelain 2>/dev/null | awk '/^worktree /{p=$2}/^branch /{b=$2; if(p!=m) system("git merge-base --is-ancestor " b " origin/main 2>/dev/null && echo " b)}' m=$(git worktree list --porcelain | head -1 | sed 's/^worktree //') 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$STALE" ] && echo "Stale worktrees detected (branches merged into main). Run /worktree-clean to remove them." || true
